description: Subscribe to live conversation events via WebSocket (consolidates subscribeConvoEvents with streamlined event types)

main.description: Subscribe to live events (messages, membership changes, epoch advances, conversation updates) via firehose-style DAG-CBOR framing. Requires a valid ticket from getSubscriptionTicket.

ticket.description: JWT ticket from getSubscriptionTicket for authentication

cursor.description: Opaque resume cursor. If provided, resume after this position.

messageEvent.description: A new encrypted message was sent

cursor.description: Resume cursor for this event position

ephemeral.description: When true, this is an ephemeral signal (typing, read receipt, presence) that should NOT be shown in chat history. Omitted (defaults to false) for regular persistent messages.

reactionEvent.description: A reaction was added or removed

typingEvent.description: A user started or stopped typing

isTyping.description: True if started typing, false if stopped

newDeviceEvent.description: A user registered a new device needing addition to the conversation

pendingAdditionId.description: ID of the pending addition for claim/complete flow

treeChanged.description: The canonical MLS tree state changed. Clients must compare confirmationTag against their local state and re-join if mismatched.

confirmationTag.description: Confirmation tag of the new canonical tree

infoEvent.description: Informational message (heartbeat, notices, or GroupInfo refresh request)

infoType.description: Structured info type for programmatic handling

groupResetEvent.description: The MLS group was reset and a new group was created for this conversation

newGroupId.description: New MLS group ID after reset

resetGeneration.description: Cumulative reset count for this conversation

resetBy.description: DID of the admin who initiated the reset

cipherSuite.description: MLS cipher suite used for the new group after reset.

membershipChangeEvent.description: A membership change occurred (joined, left, removed, kicked)

groupInfoRefreshRequestedEvent.description: A GroupInfo refresh was requested for a conversation

readditionRequestedEvent.description: A member re-addition was requested for a conversation

requestedBy.description: DID of the member requesting re-addition

circuitBreakerTrippedEvent.description: The automatic group-reset circuit breaker tripped for this conversation. Auto-reset is disabled; an admin must intervene.

resetCount.description: Recent reset count that triggered the trip

resetRequestedEvent.description: Phase 2.5: an indirect trigger (quorum vote, system sweep, inline 409/404) has requested a crypto session reset. Active members are invited to respond by submitting new MLS group material via bootstrapResetGroup or commitGroupChange. First commit wins via UNIQUE (conversation_id, generation) tie-break. The previous groupResetEvent is also emitted for backward compatibility during Stage 1.

cursor.description: Resume cursor for this event position

cryptoSessionId.description: Server-side opaque id of the crypto_session whose reset was requested (the prior session, now in state='reset_requested')

generation.description: Generation number of the prior session — clients should activate at generation+1

trigger.description: Which subsystem produced the reset request

requestEventId.description: Server-side opaque id of the crypto_session_reset_requested delivery_event for correlation

expectedNewMlsGroupId.description: If non-null, only this mls_group_id may activate. Phase 2.5 indirect triggers always emit null here; admin/bootstrap direct flows always provide a value.
